name: The Phantom Knights' Rank-Up-Magic Launch
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＲＵＭ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ランクアップマジック</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>幻影騎士団</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ファントム・ナイツ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ラウンチ
name_jp_rom: Ranku Appu Majikku - Fantomu Naitsu Raunchi
name_jp_rom_base: Ranku Appu Majikku - Gen'ei Kishidan Raunchi
desc: During the Main Phase: Target 1 DARK Xyz Monster you control with no material; Special Summon from your Extra Deck, 1 DARK Xyz Monster that is 1 Rank higher than that monster you control, by using it as material, and if you do, attach this card to it as additional material. (This is treated as an Xyz Summon. Transfer its materials to the Summoned monster.) During your Main Phase: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 DARK Xyz Monster you control; attach 1 "The Phantom Knights" monster from your hand to that monster as material.
eff: During the Main Phase: Target 1 DARK Xyz Monster you control with no material; Special Summon from your Extra Deck, 1 DARK Xyz Monster that is 1 Rank higher than that monster you control, by using it as material, and if you do, attach this card to it as additional material. (This is treated as an Xyz Summon. Transfer its materials to the Summoned monster.) During your Main Phase: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 DARK Xyz Monster you control; attach 1 "The Phantom Knights" monster from your hand to that monster as material.

action: Attaches itself from your field as Xyz Material
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Treats Special Summon as Xyz Summon
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
